title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXXVII. Jingles.
content:
Doodledy, doodledy, doodledy, dan,
        I'll have a piper to be my good man;
        And if I get less meat, I shall get game,
        Doodledy, doodledy, doodledy, dan.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXXVII. Jingles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
